description: Phase 6-8: Create canonical frameworks with journey metadata and deliver to Discord

root_files.title: Advance Publishing Set to Phase 6
root_files.content:
# Step 1: Advance to Phase 6

## Check publishing set status:
Use: `get_publishing_set_status(name)`

All conversations must be at Phase 5 before advancing.

## Advance to Phase 6:
Use: `authorize_publishing_set_phase(name)`

Phase 6 = Journey Metadata phase.

This unlocks `set_journey_metadata()` for canonical frameworks.

root_files.title: Assign Canonicals to Emergents
root_files.content:
# Step 2: Assign Canonical Frameworks

Each emergent framework needs a canonical parent.

## Add canonical to registry (if new):
Use: `add_canonical_framework(strata, slot_type, framework_name, framework_state)`

Slot types: reference | collection | workflow | library | operating_context
Framework state: aspirational | actual

## Assign emergent to canonical:
Use: `assign_canonical_to_emergent(emergent_name, canonical_name)`

Multiple emergents can belong to one canonical.

Example: HALO, SOSEEH, HIEL emergents → HALO_SHIELD canonical

root_files.title: Add Journey Metadata
root_files.content:
# Step 3: Journey Metadata (Phase 6)

Each canonical needs journey metadata for Discord posting.

Use: `set_journey_metadata(canonical_framework, obstacle, overcome, dream)`

## The Three Fields:
- **obstacle**: What problem does this framework solve? What was blocking progress?
- **overcome**: How does the framework address the obstacle? What shift happened?
- **dream**: What becomes possible? What future state does this enable?

This becomes the Discord journey post that draws people in.

## Advance to Phase 7:
Use: `authorize_publishing_set_phase(name)`

Requires: ALL canonicals have journey metadata.

root_files.title: Create Canonical Documents
root_files.content:
# Step 4: Canonical Documents (Phase 7)

## Create canonical document:
Use: `set_canonical_document(canonical_name, emergents)`

This creates a JSON that references all emergent JSONs.

## Preview canonical:
Use: `preview_canonical(canonical_name, output_path)`

This renders the full canonical with all emergents composed into one document.

Review the markdown. This is what goes on Discord.

## Advance to Phase 8:
Use: `authorize_publishing_set_phase(name)`

Requires: ALL canonical documents written.

root_files.title: Deliver to Discord
root_files.content:
# Step 5: Delivery (Phase 8)

When Phase 8 is reached, publishing set status becomes 'delivered'.

## Post to Discord:
Use Discord MCP tools to post:
1. Journey metadata → `#<strata>-journeys` channel
2. Framework document → `#<strata>-frameworks` channel

## Channels per strata:
- paiab: `#paiab-journeys`, `#paiab-frameworks`
- sanctum: `#sanctum-journeys`, `#sanctum-frameworks`
- cave: `#cave-journeys`, `#cave-frameworks`

**INGESTION COMPLETE**: Publishing set delivered. Start new publishing set for next batch.
